5w1h_framework.description: The physical and semantic coordinate system for the Khel.o Dis-play Universe. Maps human intent to physical action.

w1.question: What
w1.intent: Identify the core subject, knowledge domain, or physical material.

y.question: Why
y.intent: Define the purpose, the impact, or the specific problem to resolve.

w2.question: Where
w2.intent: Pinpoint the physical or digital coordinate (Pincode, OSM Node, or Wiki Page).

w3.question: When
w3.intent: Establish the temporal rhythm, planning window, or Earth Culture sync time.

p.question: Who
p.intent: Identify the souls, talent, or community archetype involved in the resonance.

h1.question: How
h1.intent: Determine the method of assembly, the Komute (commute) protocol, or execution style.

execution_logic.trigger: When all 6 axes reach 'locked' state, dispatch 'khela:intent:woven' event.

output_format.query_string: How to [h1] with [p] at [w2] during [w3] to [y] in the domain of [w1].
output_format.example: How to meet with mentors at local park during dawn sync to solve earth repair in the domain of ecology.

execution_logic.fallback: If any axis is null, default to 'Random Wiki Dive' or 'Seed State (Void)'.
